scope: Promote the shared nreverse/rplaca/rplacd mutation core only as part of the common Wave-2 repin; do not create an intermediate product identity.
owner_decision: The list block's 12-byte Bank credit is authorized. The common Wave-2 repin, including the prepared 16-name harvest, may proceed.
conditions: The common repin reports every pinned capacity dimension from one real product link.
Treewalk and CALLPRIM retain their route-specific strict-arity and error behavior.
The 16-name harvest is applied in the same candidate and does not create an intermediate product identity.
Any negative drift outside this authorization stops for review.
